reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: The SberHome authorization token has expired. Please sign in again via Sber ID.

abort.wrong_account: Signed in with a different Sber ID account than the original config entry. Sign in again with the correct account.

create_entry.default: Authorization successful. **No devices were imported automatically** — open the SberHome panel in the sidebar (or go to [/sberhome](/sberhome)) and pick which devices you want in Home Assistant. Until then the integration is connected but exposes no entities.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the API for device state updates (10 to 300 seconds)

send_custom_key.name: Send custom key
send_custom_key.description: Send a custom key press (confirm/back/home) to a SberHome TV.

send_direction.name: Send direction
send_direction.description: Send a D-pad direction (up/down/left/right) to a SberHome TV.

play_channel.name: Play channel
play_channel.description: Switch to a specific channel number on a SberHome TV.
